title: Oil gains as disruptions to Russian supply mounts
section_path: Oil gains as disruptions to Russian supply mounts
section_path_text: Oil gains as disruptions to Russian supply mounts
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Another positive session for risk appetite saw commodity markets edge higher. This was aided by further supply side issues across energy and metal markets. Crude oil jumped amid fears of further disruptions to Russian supply.
